text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Hmm...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I find Ines Fujin standing in front of a
pile of Toughness bars with a concerned look on
her face.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, listen to this. I was at one of my part-time
jobs yesterday...

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
A while back, one of our clients gave us a whole
load of Toughness bars to sample.

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
But I shoved all of them wayyy to the back of the
storeroom, and forgot to eat any.

text_block_list.name: Shift Supervisor
text_block_list.text:
Looks like they're going to expire tomorrow, but
you can take as many as you'd like.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...So anyway, that's what happened! It's nice that I
got to bring these back, but there are waaay too
many!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I already tried to share them with friends and
stuff, but I couldn't really hand them out in bulk
when they're about to expire, you know?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Just look at them all! What am I supposed to do
with them? It'd be a waste to throw this much
food away.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
But eating them all would definitely mess with my
diet... Right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What should I dooo? This is hopeless! I'm no good at this stuff!
choice_data_list: Just eat them all in one go!
How about I eat half of them?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: ...Ahaha. Yeah, I figured.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: I figured that was our only option too!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I was just getting hungry anyhow. Plus, I'm about
to go do some training!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And even if this does mess up my calorie count, it
won't just be my fault! You're my accomplice!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! You're going to eat them too?! You do
realize this is a lot of Toughness bars, right?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm an Umamusume, so that's one thing, but... are
you really gonna be able to eat half of these?
Won't you get stomachache?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Well, if you're sure. Okay then, thanks for the
help!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: But... how about we start you off with a third of the bars? No, wait, just a quarter of them! That'd be a huge help!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha. Yeah, you're right. There's no way I could
eat this many...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
It's a bit of a waste, but I guess these things
happen!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
All right, I'm going to go throw these bars away
before I change my mind!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: B-before I change my mind!
